create_submarine.command.no_sublevel_con: No sublevel container found in the current dimension.
create_submarine.command.player_only: Only players can execute this command.
create_submarine.command.queue_submarine: Queued spawning of %s submarine lianas of length %s, starting from your position
create_submarine.command.spawn_liana_suc: Successfully spawned a submarine liana of length %s
create_submarine.configuration.ballastFo: Multiplier on the vertical force ballast tanks apply. Lower = slower dive/ascend, higher = snappier.
create_submarine.configuration.ballastTr: Multiplier on the ballast vent fill/drain transfer rate. Lower = slower filling/emptying, higher = faster.
create_submarine.configuration.client.to: Client-side settings for UI and rendering.
create_submarine.configuration.deeperOce: How many blocks deeper to push the ocean floor when Deeper Oceans is on. WARNING: large values generate and render far more terrain and can badly hurt performance. Raise it carefully. Default 10.
create_submarine.configuration.disableIm: Disable all hull implosion damage from water pressure.
create_submarine.configuration.disableSt: Disable all Deep Seas startup UI screens (Welcome screen and Update notifications). Highly recommended to set this to TRUE if you are creating a modpack.
create_submarine.configuration.enableDee: Deepen the ocean floor below vanilla. Off = vanilla ocean depth. Set the amount with Deeper Oceans Depth.
create_submarine.configuration.enablePer: Enable the experimental Permanent Water Culling test for submarines and boats.
create_submarine.configuration.globalMax: Cap applied to maxWaterDepth of all non Create Deep Seas blocks. Per-block values are stored in config/submarine_hull.json.
create_submarine.configuration.ignoredUp: Internal: stores the version string of the last update notification dismissed by the user.
create_submarine.configuration.implosion: Multiplier on every block's implosion chance at runtime. Lower = slower cracking, higher = faster cracking.
create_submarine.configuration.maxDepthM: Multiplier on every block's effective maxWaterDepth at runtime. Lower = more fragile hulls, higher = tougher hulls.
create_submarine.configuration.pulleyMax: Maximum sliding speed of a pulley along a steel cable (blocks/s). Above this speed the pulley starts overheating.
create_submarine.configuration.steelCabl: Maximum length of a steel cable in blocks (distance between its two attachment points). Very long cables can cause server lag. Default 1000.
create_submarine.configuration.title: Create Deep Seas
create_submarine.configuration.waterThru: Multiplier on water thruster thrust output. Lower = weaker propulsion, higher = stronger.
create_submarine.configuration.welcomeSc: Internal: Set to true once the Deep Seas welcome screen is confirmed. Set back to false to show the welcome screen again on the next main menu.
create_submarine.ponder.ballast_vent.tex: The vent requires rotational force to operate.
It must be connected to the ballasts via pipes.
Once powered and connected, it manages ballast pressure.
The vent MUST have at least one face in contact with the sea.
Reverse the direction of rotation to switch the pump to Drain Mode and expel water outside!
create_submarine.ponder.electrolyzer.tex: The Electrolyzer requires water to produce oxygen.
It must be powered by Forge Energy (FE).
Water is converted into Oxygen for your submarine!
You have the choice between Create Crafts & Additions, Create New Age, and Create Power Grid to provide electricity.
The Oxygen Diffuser requires oxygen generated by an Electrolyzer.
It consumes oxygen proportionally to the size of the submarine.
To activate the Oxygen Diffuser, provide it with a redstone signal.
create_submarine.ponder.poulis.text_1:
Pinch the cable between
two Pulleys facing each other
to attach a sublevel to it.
create_submarine.ponder.poulis.text_2:
The sublevel will then
follow the cable wherever it goes.
create_submarine.ponder.steel_cable.head: Steel Cable
create_submarine.ponder.steel_cable.text:
Entities can walk on
a taut steel cable.
create_submarine.ponder.steel_cable_elec:
With an electricity mod such as
Create: Addition, supply FE
directly to the Rope Winch
holding the cable to electrify it.
create_submarine.ponder.water_thruster.t: The Water Thruster uses pressurized water to generate thrust.
Connecting it to a water source and providing kinetic energy will activate it.
The more pressure and speed, the faster you go!
This tank provides the necessary water for the propulsion.
create_submarine.ui.text.select_block_ti: Select a block to edit its properties
create_submarine.update.message: A new version of Create Deep Seas is available: v%s! Download it on %s.
create_submarine.update.message_screen: A new version of Create Deep Seas is available: v%s
create_submarine.update.title: Deep Seas Update
create_submarine.welcome.message: It's strongly recommended to set up your Deep Seas preferences before you dive in — hull strength, propulsion, ocean depth and more can all be tuned to your liking.
create_submarine.welcome.title: Welcome to Create Deep Seas
item.create_submarine.ballast_tank.toolt:
Capacity can be seen with
Create's engineer goggles.

Allows a submarine to float,
it can be filled with water with a
item.create_submarine.creative_oxygenato:
Automatically manages oxygen
and water drainage.

Removes water when
the submarine is airtight.
item.create_submarine.floater.tooltip.su:
Allows a boat to float
on the water surface.
item.create_submarine.pressurizer.toolti:
Allows submarines to have
pressure-resistant windows.
item.create_submarine.underwater_mine.to:
When attached to a Create Aeronautics contraption,
this mine will detonate if entities or
boats get too close.
create_submarine.configuration.submarine:
Multiplier on Submarine Propeller thrust and airflow output.
Lower = weaker propulsion, higher = stronger.
item.create_submarine.submarine_propelle: Excellent in water, but useless outside
create_submarine.lithostitched_missing.m:
An experimental feature has been enabled in the Create Deep Seas configuration, however this requires the 'Lithostitched' library to function properly.

The game will not crash, but the option has been automatically disabled. You will need to re-enable it in the configuration once Lithostitched is installed.
create_submarine.configuration.enableAby:
Enable the Abyss dimension.
Requires the 'Lithostitched' mod to be installed.
